retrieved_result: How to Set Up Wireless Printing on a Dell Up Next With Microsoft Windows 7 or Vista, you can hook up all your computers in your home to one Dell printer, wirelessly. All you need is a printer equipped with a wireless adaptor, a router set up with a wireless network and the simple steps below. Here's how to set up wireless printing on a Dell
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses wireless printer setup on Windows 7/Vista, not Docker or container tech; not relevant to the query.
